name: Stock Return Calculator
desc: Stock Return Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_title: Stock Return Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Calculate stock investment returns. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate return on 10,000 EUR stock with 8% yearly.
result_context: The retorno_pct of {retorno_pct}% is your total return including dividends. the gain of {gain} is profit per share.
formula_display: Total Return% = [(Sale Price - Purchase Price + Dividends) ÷ Purchase Price] × 100
mistakes: Forgetting to include dividends in total return calculation
Not accounting for transaction costs and taxes on gains
Comparing returns without considering holding period
